notes: Minimal 1-episode example instance. Full canonical instance at ../history_zoom_events_registry.json. Exists to satisfy META-CF example-instance separation and demonstrate the minimum valid shape for VIZ-V12.

key_events.label: Mar 2000: Dot-Com peak
key_events.rationale: NASDAQ Composite closed at 5048.62, all-time peak of the tech bubble.

key_events.label: Mar 2001: Recession begins
key_events.rationale: NBER-dated start of the 2001 recession; credit spreads widen.
key_events.source_citation: NBER US Business Cycle Expansions and Contractions table.

key_events.label: Jul 2002: WorldCom bankruptcy
key_events.rationale: Largest US bankruptcy at the time; spread-widening local peak.
